title: Update module github.com/containers/storage to v1.57.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/storage](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage) | `v1.56.2-0.20250123125217-80d3c0e77d29` -> `v1.57.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.57.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.57.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.56.2-0.20250123125217-80d3c0e77d29/v1.57.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.56.2-0.20250123125217-80d3c0e77d29/v1.57.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/storage (github.com/containers/storage)</summary>

### [`v1.57.0`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/releases/tag/v1.57.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.56.1...v1.57.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump c/storage to v1.56.0 by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://redirect.github.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2163](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2163)
-   chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v1.62.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2167](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2167)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz to v0.16.1 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2172](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2172)
-   chunked: rework GetBlobAt usage by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2162](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2162)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.27.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2164](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2164)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/moby/sys/capability to v0.4.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2171](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2171)
-   cirrus: update CI image to f41 by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2173](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2173)
-   add support for unpacking layers with xattrs set on FreeBSD by [@​kimminss0](https://redirect.github.com/kimminss0) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2170](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2170)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/stretchr/testify to v1.10.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2178](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2178)
-   chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v1.62.2 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2179](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2179)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz to v0.16.2 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2182](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2182)
-   pkg/system: add fromStatT for NetBSD by [@​tydavis](https://redirect.github.com/tydavis) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2181](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2181)
-   pkg/system: add mimicked xattr syscalls on FreeBSD by [@​kimminss0](https://redirect.github.com/kimminss0) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2177](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2177)
-   store: correctly remove incomplete layers on load. by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2185](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2185)
-   archive: store the override xattr with the inode type by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2183](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2183)
-   Enable overlay without cgo by [@​koct9i](https://redirect.github.com/koct9i) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2192](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2192)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.28.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2189](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2189)
-   store: new Dedup() API by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2176](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2176)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/cyphar/filepath-securejoin to v0.3.5 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2190](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2190)
-   chunked: handle creating root directory by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2194](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2194)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz to v0.16.3 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2195](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2195)
-   Fix `SafeChown` when `ContainersOverrideXattr` is unset by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2197](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2197)
-   Move pkg/chunked/internal to pkg/chunked/internal/minimal by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2196](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2196)
-   archive: detect symlink target changes by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2199](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2199)
-   composefs: remove cgo dependency by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2201](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2201)
-   composefs: fix comment by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2200](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2200)
-   fix(deps): update golang.org/x/exp digest to [`b2144cd`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/commit/b2144cd) by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2203](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2203)
-   chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v1.63.3 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2204](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2204)
-   chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v1.63.4 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2205](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2205)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.29.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2206](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2206)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/cyphar/filepath-securejoin to v0.3.6 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2198](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2198)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20250107 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2207](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2207)
-   Compute an uncompressed digest for chunked layers by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2155](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2155)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/cyphar/filepath-securejoin to v0.4.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2210](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2210)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/tchap/go-patricia/v2 to v2.3.2 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2211](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2211)
-   Merge v1.56.1 into main by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2214](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2214)
-   Revert "fix(deps): update module github.com/cyphar/filepath-securejoin to v0.4.0" by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2216](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2216)
-   ioutils: fix typo by [@​hanwen-flow](https://redirect.github.com/hanwen-flow) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2218](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2218)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/vbatts/tar-split to v0.11.7 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2215](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2215)
-   chunked: use fallback mechanism on non-linux platforms by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2231](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2231)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​tydavis](https://redirect.github.com/tydavis) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2181](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2181)
-   [@​koct9i](https://redirect.github.com/koct9i) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2192](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2192)
-   [@​hanwen-flow](https://redirect.github.com/hanwen-flow) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2218](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2218)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.56.1...v1.57.0

</details>
